Video.summary: In this episode, understand why ancient Egypt had to invent some form of writing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: Why Egypt Needed Hieroglyphs

Video.summary: Professor Brier shows you how to write each hieroglyph and how to position them.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: The Ancient Egyptian Alphabet

Video.summary: Consider the nature of Athenian democracy and how it functioned in practice.
Video.grandparentTitle: Athenian Democracy: An Experiment for the Ages
Video.title: Why Athenian Democracy Matters

Video.summary: Delve into Homer's epics to examine several early examples of democratic assembly.
Video.grandparentTitle: Athenian Democracy: An Experiment for the Ages
Video.title: The Origins of Greek Democracy

Video.summary: The series begins with a brief overview of Tocqueville's masterwork.
Video.grandparentTitle: Tocqueville and the American Experiment
Video.title: An Overview of Democracy in America

Image.alt: An Overview of Democracy in America
An Overview of Democracy in America
An Overview of Democracy in America

Video.summary: Meet the young French nobleman whose most famous book was only one achievement in a life marked by several.
Video.grandparentTitle: Tocqueville and the American Experiment
Video.title: Alexis de Tocqueville'A Brief Biography

Video.summary: Take a virtual walk from the Washington Monument to the US Capitol to explore the history of Earth.
Video.grandparentTitle: Introduction to Paleontology
Video.title: History on a Geological Scale

Video.summary: Learn about the fascinating individuals and showmen whose curiosity led to the development of paleontology.
Video.grandparentTitle: Introduction to Paleontology
Video.title: Life Cast in Ancient Stone

Video.summary: Consider why Pompeii offers more than just a story of cataclysm.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Reflections on and of Pompeii

Video.summary: Examine the geological forces that forged the Bay of Naples.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples

Image.alt: Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples
Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples
Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples

Video.summary: Uncover the history of Pompeii\'s excavation in the 1700.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: The Rediscovery of Vesuvian Lands

Video.summary: Delve deep into Pompeii\'s remote Etruscan history.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Etruscan Pompeii - 5th Century B.C.

Video.summary: Explore the Pacific Crest Trail'an extraordinary route that stretches 2,650 miles from the deserts of Southern California all the way to the Canadian border.
Video.grandparentTitle: America’s Great Trails
Video.title: Pacific Crest Trail

Video.summary: Journey with Mick along the hazardous 800-mile backcountry route of the Hayduke Trail.
Video.grandparentTitle: America’s Great Trails
Video.title: Hayduke Trail

Video.summary: Travel one of the most scenic and rugged long-distance trails in the world'the 1,200-mile Pacific Northwest Trail.
Video.grandparentTitle: America’s Great Trails
Video.title: Pacific Northwest Trail

Video.summary: At 3,100 miles, the Continental Divide Trail is the second-longest National Scenic Trail in the United States.
Video.grandparentTitle: America’s Great Trails
Video.title: Continental Divide Trail

Video.summary: Begin with an overview of the historical, cultural, and natural riches of Germany and Austria. Preview the route the course will take along the Danube, Rhine, and Elbe Rivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Tours: Germany & Austria
Video.title: A Tale of Three Rivers

Video.summary: Your journey starts in Vienna, the cultural, political, and historical epicenter of Austria. In a sweeping tour, visit iconic sites ranging from palaces and cathedrals to cafes and taverns.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Tours: Germany & Austria
Video.title: Vienna: The Heart of Austrian Culture

Image.alt: Vienna: The Heart of Austrian Culture
Vienna: The Heart of Austrian Culture
Vienna: The Heart of Austrian Culture

Video.summary: Leaving Vienna along the Danube, enjoy the rich sights of the Wachau Valley. Discover the history, art and architecture in places like Krems, Mautern, Stift Göttweig, and Melk.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Tours: Germany & Austria
Video.title: The Wachau: Fine Wines and Majestic Monasteries

Image.alt: The Wachau: Fine Wines and Majestic Monasteries
The Wachau: Fine Wines and Majestic Monasteries
The Wachau: Fine Wines and Majestic Monasteries

Video.summary: Stop first at the vibrant city of Linz, Austria's contemporary mecca for art, culture, and technology. Crossing into Germany, discover the architecture and culture of Passau,
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Tours: Germany & Austria
Video.title: The Danube from Linz to Passau

Image.alt: The Danube from Linz to Passau
The Danube from Linz to Passau
The Danube from Linz to Passau

Video.summary: Discover the oldest paintings in the world, in the extraordinary cave art of Altamira, Lascaux, and Chauvet.
Video.grandparentTitle: World Heritage Sites: Exploring the World's Greatest Places
Video.title: Paleolithic Cave Art of Spain and France

Image.alt: Paleolithic Cave Art of Spain and France
Paleolithic Cave Art of Spain and France
Paleolithic Cave Art of Spain and France

Video.summary: Learn about the builder of Taj, the Mughal emperor Shah Jahan, and his beloved wife Mumtaz Mahal.
Video.grandparentTitle: World Heritage Sites: Exploring the World's Greatest Places
Video.title: The Taj Mahal of Agra

Video.summary: The Great Barrier Reef is one of the world’s natural wonders, drawing travelers to its multicolored reefs.
Video.grandparentTitle: World Heritage Sites: Exploring the World's Greatest Places
Video.title: Australia’s Great Barrier Reef

Video.summary: The Mogao Grottoes in northwestern China, contain one of the most dazzling collections of Buddhist art.
Video.grandparentTitle: World Heritage Sites: Exploring the World's Greatest Places
Video.title: The Mogao Grottoes and Manuscripts
